steps.assistant_text: Copy-with-flags leaf (sibling of 9B60/99DC), 69.6%->exact on FIRST variant. The 'modified-param home-spill cap' note was STALE — predates the unsigned-char-param lever: (1) unsigned char a2, a3 params emit BOTH the sw a2,8(sp)/sw a3,0xC(sp) arg-homes AND the eager andi zero-extends (int param + &0xFF gives andi but never the home); (2) comma-init for-loop pre-header + trailing if(n==3)break (the 99DC/9B60 recipe): s=a1 copies to t0 freeing a1 for li a1,3, sb t6 lands in the bne delay. Siblings 9988/9B0C same shape — same combo should crack both.
